heading: Low-speed electric bicycles
label: 2085 Low-speed electric bicycles
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a), was redesignated by , , .Section 2052(a)(1) of this titlesection 2052(a)(5) of this titlePub. L. 110–314, title II, § 235(b)(4)122 Stat. 3074Aug. 14, 2008
amendments: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a), was redesignated by , , .Section 2052(a)(1) of this titlesection 2052(a)(5) of this titlePub. L. 110–314, title II, § 235(b)(4)122 Stat. 3074Aug. 14, 2008

children.heading: Construction
children.label: a Construction
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, low-speed electric bicycles are consumer products within the meaning of section 2052(a)(1) of this title and shall be subject to the Commission regulations published at section 1500.18(a)(12) and part 1512 of title 16, Code of Federal Regulations.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Definition
children.label: b Definition
children.text: For the purpose of this section, the term “low-speed electric bicycle” means a two- or three-wheeled vehicle with fully operable pedals and an electric motor of less than 750 watts (1 h.p.), whose maximum speed on a paved level surface, when powered solely by such a motor while ridden by an operator who weighs 170 pounds, is less than 20 mph.

children.heading: Promulgation of requirements
children.label: c Promulgation of requirements
children.text: To further protect the safety of consumers who ride low-speed electric bicycles, the Commission may promulgate new or amended requirements applicable to such vehicles as necessary and appropriate.

children.heading: Preemption
children.label: d Preemption
children.text: This section shall supersede any State law or requirement with respect to low-speed electric bicycles to the extent that such State law or requirement is more stringent than the Federal law or requirements referred to in subsection (a).
